headline: Day +2 after the Apr 22–29 launch window — ~03:06 UTC sync (Job 7b431dc7) surfaced 0 functional changes — pure Asana export-side filter rotation as LAMPSPLUS - MOC narrowed 2/2/0 → 1/1/0 and section - Implementation rotated from [[393827 - ATP Integration - No Token Caching In PHP (Mao.ATP.EnableTokenCaching Missing)|393827]] ATP Token Caching + [[LPWE-124 - Update ATP - Delivery Date Logic|LPWE-124]] ATP Delivery-Date Logic to [[LAMPSPLUS-263 - Cybersource Failover Customization|LAMPSPLUS-263]] Cybersource Failover alone (modified-date bump only on the LAMPSPLUS-263 raw file 2026-05-01 → 2026-05-02; no body or comment changes; 13:30 UTC retest-evidence narrative unchanged from 15:06 UTC sync). Earlier ~00:06 UTC sync (Job 492ba5e2) surfaced 0 functional changes — pure Asana export-side filter rotation as LAMPSPLUS - MOC re-widened 1/1/0 → 2/2/0 and section - Implementation rotated from [[405450 - Relationship Widget Is Not Showing Number Of Lights on PDP|405450]] alone to [[393827 - ATP Integration - No Token Caching In PHP (Mao.ATP.EnableTokenCaching Missing)|393827]] ATP Token Caching + [[LPWE-124 - Update ATP - Delivery Date Logic|LPWE-124]] ATP Delivery-Date Logic, with LPWE-124 also surfacing in LPWE Improvements (replacing [[LPWE-92 - New Checkout Warning Messages|LPWE-92]]) — first cross-MOC visibility for LPWE-124. Earlier ~23:06 UTC sync (Job a5912e9f) surfaced 0 functional changes — pure Asana export-side filter rotation as LAMPSPLUS - MOC narrowed 2/2/0 → 1/1/0 and section - Implementation rotated from 393827 + LAMPSPLUS-1070 to 405450 PDP Relationship Widget (carry-forward dev-fix scope). Earlier ~22:06 UTC sync (Job e6286af2) **unblock:** Harry Donihue 21:15 UTC replied to Miguel Garrido's 04-30 23:02 UTC C#-code-example ask on [[393827 - ATP Integration - No Token Caching In PHP (Mao.ATP.EnableTokenCaching Missing)|393827]] ATP Token Caching with 4 attachments — `MaoAvailableToPromiseTokenService.cs`, `OnDemandInvalidationDistributedCacheManager.cs`, `RedisCacheManager.cs`, plus a `MaoAvailableToPromiseTokenService.pdf` doc — clearing the spec gate so Leslie Manzanera Ornelas can translate the C# token-caching pattern into PHP. Earlier ~21:06 UTC sync (Job 8b5ff8f6) surfaced 1 NEW P1 [[703294 - Order Summary Displays -Free- for Shipping & Processing When Multiple Line Items Have Shipping Charges|703294]] Cart Order Summary "Free" shipping bug filed by Tan Nguyen, owner Leslie. Earlier ~17:06 UTC sync (Job 86fdeaca) surfaced 3 NEW P1 MAO Code Audit bugs ([[232640 - OrderAttribute TaxProviderId Missing From MAO Payload|232640]] / [[253957 - Payment Response Status Should Return null Instead Of -Open|253957]] / [[360382 - Missing AuthAmount Guard On reasonCode === 0|360382]]) all under Leslie reversing the 04-29 Kyle-consolidation pattern. Active Production Failures unchanged at 7. Underlying LAMPSPLUS raw count unchanged at 2,119; LPWE unchanged at 227.
